input.prompt: A .NET solution build has failed. The binary log from the failed build is available at build.binlog in the current directory. You do NOT have access to the original source files — only the binlog. Analyze this binlog file to diagnose all build failures, identify which errors are root causes versus cascading failures from dependent project failures, and suggest targeted fixes for each root cause.

data.reasoningText: The user wants me to analyze a .NET build failure using a binary log file (build.binlog). Let me start by examining the binlog file and using MSBuild tools to extract error information from it.

arguments.command: dotnet tool install -g MSBuild.StructuredLogger 2>/dev/null || true; dotnet tool install -g dotnet-msbuild-log 2>/dev/null || true

dotnet build build.binlog -nologo 2>&1 | head -200
dotnet tool install -g MSBuild.StructuredLogger 2>/dev/null || true; dotnet tool install -g dotnet-msbuild-log 2>/dev/null || true
